decision_to_unlock: Determine whether a repository-local gate makes agentic MVP authorization faster and more trustworthy for product leads.

d0_user_journey.observable_result: The proposal is stored as advisory, untrusted data.
Hard blockers and the cheapest next action appear before any score.

d0_user_journey.action: Reviews charter and issues a bounded warrant
d0_user_journey.observable_result: Only declared actions, lanes, paths, budget, and deadline become executable.

success_metrics.name: Blocked unauthorized start
success_metrics.measurement_method: Run start before warrant issuance and inspect the stable reason code.

success_metrics.name: Authorized happy path
success_metrics.measurement_method: Issue the demo-only local-integrity warrant and start one in-scope task.

kill_and_pivot_triggers.condition: Judges cannot run the credential-free workflow from the README in under five minutes.

technical_boundaries: No network required for core workflow
data_boundaries: Only synthetic fixtures in the judge scenario

demo_beats.acceptance: The assessment returns EXPERIMENT_REQUIRED with build_allowed false.
A local-integrity fixture warrant permits exactly one in-scope start.
Changing the signed charter permanently blocks the existing warrant.

post_mvp_decision_meeting.decision_question: Should the team pilot TEMPO with real discovery evidence and its existing coding-agent workflow?

rollback_or_disposal_plan: Delete the generated demo workspace; retain only the repository fixtures and explicitly selected receipts.
